title: Operate a telehandler
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Operate a telehandler demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for telehandler operations

pcs.text: Confirm activity to be undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm activity to be undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm activity to be undertaken.

pcs.text: Select telehandler appropriate for the activity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select telehandler appropriate for the activity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select telehandler appropriate for the activity.

pcs.text: Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manuals and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manuals and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source and interpret relevant machinery operation and maintenance manuals and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Conduct telehandler routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct telehandler routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct telehandler routine pre-operational checks according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults or malfunctions, and rectify, report and tag defects according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults or malfunctions, and rectify, report and tag defects according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect for missing parts, damage, faults or malfunctions, and rectify, report and tag defects according to workplace procedures.

elements.title: Select, fit and use attachments

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select telehandler attachment for the task.

pcs.text: Safely fit attachment according to operation and maintenance manual and local conditions for use

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely fit attachment according to operation and maintenance manual and local conditions for use.

pcs.text: Use attachment according to design limits and workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use attachment according to design limits and workplace procedures.

elements.title: Operate and monitor telehandler

pcs.text: Perform pre-start and start-up procedures according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform pre-start and start-up procedures according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform pre-start and start-up procedures according to workplace procedures and manufacturer instructions.

pcs.text: Check telehandler controls, brakes, attachments and implements for manoeuvrability and serviceability, and ensure faults are rectified or reported according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check telehandler controls, brakes, attachments and implements for manoeuvrability and serviceability, and ensure faults are rectified or reported according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check telehandler controls, brakes, attachments and implements for manoeuvrability and serviceability, and ensure faults are rectified or reported according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assess site and operating hazards and apply safe operating techniques
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess site and operating hazards and apply safe operating techniques?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess site and operating hazards and apply safe operating techniques.

pcs.text: Drive and operate telehandler, modifying operating techniques as required to meet changing work conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Drive and operate telehandler, modifying operating techniques as required to meet changing work conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Drive and operate telehandler, modifying operating techniques as required to meet changing work conditions.

pcs.text: Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Continually monitor hazards and risks, and ensure safety of self, other personnel, plant and equipment.

pcs.text: Maintain communications with other site personnel during telehandler operations using hand, audible or radio communication equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain communications with other site personnel during telehandler operations using hand, audible or radio communication equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain communications with other site personnel during telehandler operations using hand, audible or radio communication equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete work within the operating capacity of the equipment, responding to alarms and indicators according to manufacturer specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete work within the operating capacity of the equipment, responding to alarms and indicators according to manufacturer specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete work within the operating capacity of the equipment, responding to alarms and indicators according to manufacturer specifications.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform routine operational minor servicing and maintenance according to operation and maintenance manual.

pcs.text: Identify, record and report telehandler and attachment malfunctions, faults, irregular performance or damage according to workplace procedures
